channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Black bags on the sidewalk, 8th July
item.description:
Two black bags full of presumably grass left in front of n.40 Please can you inform people to use garden waste bins? Thank you
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to the entrance to 100 Willesden Lane, near the Tesco ATM, 8th July
item.description:
Someone left cabinet doors, rubbish and boxes from a kitchen next to the entrance to 100 Willesden Lane, between that and the Tesco ATM. There is a camera at the ATM - please prosecute those responsible as it keeps happening. I returned from holiday on Sunday night and has been there at least since then.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Flytipping outside 133D Eglinton Road, 8th July
item.description:
The residents of 133D Eglinton Road have left a huge amount of flytipping outside the property which is blocking the pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags of "garden waste", 8th July
item.description:
Someone has dumped a load of black bins full of garden waste outside. The regular collection is not retrieving them as they are not normal waste. I spoke to one of the green waste retrieval crews and they told me to put a request on here as it is apparently "Fly tipping". I do not know who collected the waste, nor who bagged it up and left it outside.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 202-216, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illuminated sign - out, 8th July
item.description:
P1784
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2A, East Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of lose slabs., 8th July
item.description:
Reported months ago still nothing done. Lose slabs outside boots, on the road and outside the glades
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Elmfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 8th July
item.description:
This is a chronic problem on the street near the elementary school, and the council has been ignoring it repeatedly. The council should come and clean around the rubbish bins at least 3/4 times per week and prevent people from flytipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elderfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree has been knocked over, 8th July
item.description:
Tree has been knocked over

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elm Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Needs cutting back and deep cleaning, 8th July
item.description:
The area at peckham end of pioneer street is overgrown with weeds ect plus beer can bottles carrier bags fag boxs ect it needs maintaining and regular cleaning as Alcoholics and drug users are using it as a dump and toilet please can this be addressed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pioneer Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car is SORN with no MOT and in the way, 8th July
item.description:
The car have been there since we moved in the property in February 2026, many times we haven't had our bins collected as well as getting woken up early morning by delivery drivers not being able to get up the street due to this car. I also believe there is supposed to be double yellow lines on this side of the road but they have worn off the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eden Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing trolly with rubbisn dumped outside my bedroom window. Mouldy sofa dumped further down street, 8th July
item.description:
Been next to the bins on Maxted road for approx 2 weeks. It has now been dumped outside my bedroom window (unsure who has moved it). Not been taken by council whilst by the bins! Overflowing with rubbish, wasp and awful smell of sick/feces.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Sandison Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped large cardboard boxes, food rubbish, household waste. Sitting outside the two communal bin areas for two weeks now. Also broken mirror in alley between John Ruskin St and Dighton court. Broken glass all over the floor, 8th July
item.description:
This rubbish has been there for nearly two weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Ruskin Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street not swept properly today, 8th July
item.description:
Resident reporting street cleaner came this morning but the vehicle swept all of the dirt from the side of the road into the middle leaving the road un swept. There is a lot stones and dirt and empty crisp bags & Bottles blocking drains at the end of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Stapley Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Man hole cover half of it is misding, 8th July
item.description:
Man hole cover is broken not long before it falls in with the weight which is passing over it everyday

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 161, Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging Veg encroaching on Footway, 8th July
item.description:
Overhanging Veg encroaching on Footway on Wagtail Way either side of Watermint Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Watermint Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Sliver birch tree, 8th July
item.description:
Dead Sliver birch tree in verge out side No 6 Clarendon Way, please cut down and removed and replace as necessary.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Clarendon Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kids area now being used by crack heads, 8th July
item.description:
Kids area has been taken over by crack heads and Prostitutes rubish all over the place this is becoming a daily occurrence and as Pioneer street Se15 5qh has no road sweeper the street is looking absolutely awful and becoming dangerous for Residents and public

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pioneer Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 8th July
item.description:
Usual place. Southwark refuses to put up a 'No Fly Tipping' notice. C'est la vie.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 86-92, McNeil Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foot Path/Cycle root restricted by vegetation BR31QR, 8th July
item.description:
The public footpath/cycle route Lennard Road to Kangley Bridge Road is severely restricted by all the vegetation on either side which has grown high and now collapsing on to the path. In some places the pathwidth is reduced by 70% .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cricket Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Matress, 8th July
item.description:
Mattress dumped at the top of Oakmere Road near junction with Wickham Lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
